\tzpentry{ID4916}{Universe Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4916 introduces Universe Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\Delta S_{\text{universe}} = \frac{Q_{\text{dissipated}}}{T} - \Delta S_{\text{system}} > 0\]
